title: agrostis exarata var. ampla
intro: Agrostis exarata var. ampla, commonly known as tall red fescue, is a perennial grass species native to North America. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Agrostis exarata var. ampla include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as providing antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Agrostis exarata var. ampla can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
